questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Scheduling Algorithms?
options: Inefficient scaling of FCFS, SJF, Priority, Round Robin time slice.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of FCFS, SJF, Priority, Round Robin time slice.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how FCFS, SJF, Priority, Round Robin time slice scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
